---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the problem.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message or stack trace if any.

## Environment

- iPLAID commit / version:
- Operating system:
- Docker version (`docker --version`):
- Browser (if a UI bug):
- Dispenser: [ ] iDOT  [ ] Echo
- Interface used: [ ] Web app  [ ] Notebook  [ ] API directly

## Inputs

If the bug is data-dependent, attach (or paste a minimal version of) the `config.json`, layout CSV, meta CSV, and any source-plate layout that reproduce it. Strip anything sensitive first.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, related issues, recent changes to your setup.
